Sequence

Left click to remove

Right click to preview

Shift click to clone

Scroll to change pitch

Ctrl+scroll to change volume

Selected section: None

Ctrl+Click to select a section

Ctrl+Up/Down to change section

You can pin these section controls from the settings.

I own pretty much nothing on this site please don't kill me

PRO MODE

Set tempo

Sets the rate at which sounds are played.
Default is 300 sounds per minute.

BPM

Set volume

Sets the volume of all subsequent sounds.
Default is 100%, max is 600%.

%

Pause

Pauses for a specified duration.

beats

Loop

Loop for a specified number of times.
Returns to the start if no start point (◇) is set

loops

Transpose

Increases or decreases the pitch of all subsequent sounds.

semitones

Pulse

Pulses the screen a certain amount of times.
Only one pulse action can be active at a time.
Ignores tempo changes.

Pulses:

(total amount)

Frequency:

(every X beats)

Background Color

Sets the page's background color.

#

Fade time:

secs

Clear all sounds?

Surprisingly, this can't be undone.
(hold shift to skip this popup)

Settings

(hover over a setting for information)

Action shortcuts

Disable Animations

Auto-scroll

Pin section controls

Exit confirmation

Old save system

Alt file extension

Keyboard Shortcuts

Sound list

Left click: Place sound

Shift + left click: Place sound at start

Right click: Preview sound

Action list

Left click: Place action

Right click: Edit action

Shift + left click: Place action at start

Right click: Place action, skip popups

Sequence

Left click: Remove icon

Right click: Preview sound

Drag: Move icon

Shift + left click: Duplicate (directly after)

Shift (or alt) + right click: Duplicate (end of sequence)

Shift + drag: Duplicate to position

Scroll: Adjust pitch or action

Ctrl + scroll: Adjust volume

Shift + scroll: Larger adjust

Alt + scroll: Smaller adjust

Up/down: Same as scrolling

Divider sections

Ctrl + click: Select/deselect section

Ctrl + up/down: Next/previous section

Ctrl + right click: Show/hide section

Ctrl + D: Deselect section

Global

Space/enter: Play/stop

Esc: Close popup

Ctrl + S: Save

Ctrl + Shift + S: Save as

Ctrl + Alt + S: View sequence data

Ctrl + O: Load

Ctrl + P: Toggle pro mode

Shift + /: Settings

Ctrl + /: Shortcuts
